description: ProofDesk is an Agent Service Provider that issues machine-readable Verification Receipts for blockchain targets (contracts or wallets) before an autonomous agent executes a financial action against them.

tools.name: proofdesk_verify_target
tools.description: Verify a blockchain target before an autonomous agent executes a financial action. Returns a Verification Receipt with a PASS/FAIL/WARNING verdict, a confidence score, and a breakdown across contract security, liquidity, reputation, and market structure checks.

target_address.description: EVM-style contract or wallet address to verify (0x-prefixed, 40 hex chars).

chain_id.description: EVM chain ID the target lives on (e.g. 1 for Ethereum mainnet).

transaction_payload.description: Optional raw or encoded transaction payload the calling agent intends to submit.

cost.notes: Pricing model TBD post-hackathon; no payment integration in this MVP.

trust_and_safety.data_sources: Verification checks run in MOCK mode by default (deterministic, realistic simulated data) when live provider API keys are not configured. See README for enabling live mode.
trust_and_safety.determinism: Mock results are deterministic per (target_address, chain_id) pair - repeated calls return consistent verdicts, not random noise.
trust_and_safety.receipt_integrity: Every receipt includes a SHA-256 hash over its canonical fields so a receiving agent can detect tampering in transit.
